since_last: 68% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.36%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.52% · BTC +1.79% · Gold +1.25% · Nasdaq100 +1.37%. 68% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.36%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.36%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +8.46%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +8.46%, MU +7.50%, SKHY +7.48%, INTC +6.02%, CBRS +5.95%. Laggards: WDAY -3.20%, ADBE -3.04%, ZBRA -2.47%, INTU -1.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.76% at $120.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
